description: Style Note This wallet from hidekraft is a must-have accessory for the style conscious male. Carry your monetary essentials in style with this classic wallet.Product Details Black leather wallet with white stitch detailsTwo main compartments with brand tagThree credit card slots and two slip pockets on the left with embossed brandingOne buttoned coin pocket with two credit card slots and a slip pocket on the rightComes with a removable card holder (two credit card slots on one side and an id card holder on the otherWarranty: 180 daysMaterial and Care Leather Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlightSize 12 cm x 10 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
